$comment: Border-radius tokens. Three semantic sizes plus a sharp option. Pick by element type, not by 'small / medium / large'. Code source of truth: packages/ui/src/tokens/tokens.json (semantic.radius).

none.usage: Reserved for full-bleed surfaces and tabular cells. Avoid in product UI.

control.usage: Buttons, inputs, badges, checkboxes, segmented controls.
control.notes: Tailwind: rounded-control. All interactive primitives use this by default.

card.usage: Cards, sheets, popovers, modals, raised panels.
card.notes: Tailwind: rounded-card. The Card primitive ships with this radius.

pill.usage: Tags, avatars, fully-rounded badges, status pills.
pill.notes: Tailwind: rounded-pill. Equivalent to rounded-full in Tailwind defaults — kept as a named token for intent clarity.
